name: flowvault-audit
description: Deterministic reliability audit for n8n workflow JSON. Workflow stays on your machine.
long_description: FlowVault Audit MCP runs three deterministic reliability checks on raw n8n workflow JSON: (1) error path coverage - flags failable nodes with no error branch, (2) suppression-check pre-send - flags outbound workflows missing or inverting a suppression / unsubscribe / DNC gate before the send, (3) auth drift - flags stale credential references and credentials with no rotation hint. Returns a structured audit report with severity-ranked findings, actionable fix hints, and a Production-Ready grade. The audit core is rules, not LLM judgement: same input, same output. Workflow JSON never leaves your machine - the server is local stdio. Part of the FlowVault reliability layer.

tools.name: audit_workflow
tools.description: Audit an n8n workflow JSON export for error path coverage, suppression-check pre-send, and auth drift. Returns a structured reliability report with severity-ranked findings, fix hints, and a Production-Ready grade.
